name: Terrors Of North - Finnish Cabin
short_description: You think you're in luck for getting a cabin for such a good price but you will soon find out why the previous owner wanted to get rid of it. Will you survive the Finnish Cabin experience?
detailed_description:
Story Of The Game

You get a fairly large cabin for a insanely good price. You arrive at the cabin and slowly the low price starts to make sense. One of your neighbours is missing, one of them is a vile criminal. You will need to survive the night at the cabin. Or atleast try.

Gameplay

The game is a singleplayer first person simulator with some tasks and a finnish forest map for scary exploration.

Features

- VHS aesthetic

- Dark and tense environment

- NPCs with funny voicelines

-Some simple tasks
